meaning: n.奉行者,遵守法律或规章、习俗的人adj.深切注意的
examples: That's a good description, Mrs. Drummond. You're very observant.
The husband is not usually so observant.
Its somewhat ambitious title was "The Book of Life" and it attempted to show how much an observant man might learn by an accurate and systematic examination of all that came in his way.
Its author, Ruth Harris, is not a devout Christian but, like Ms Medwick, a non-observant Jew.
Rae's second effort marks the arrival of a newly observant songwriter and an absolutely fearless singer.
